chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1699 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.1330/2023 (151 CPC) 3. For orders on CMA No.9858/2018 (Ex./A) 4. For orders on CMA No.9859/2018 (I Rule 10) 5. For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners are special persons/disabled and seek employment in government sector on this ground. Learned AAG submits that this issue has already been decided by the Supreme Court vide order dated 14.07.2022 passed in C. P. No. 745-K to 750-K of 2022 in the case of The Province of Sindh & others v. Saddam Hussain & others, and by this Court vide order dated 08.02.2023 passed C. P. No. D-1489 of 2022 in that the cases of disabled persons for service on this ground would be considered only after disability certificates are issued to them by the Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits if the case of the petitioners is considered for employment in different departments by the Government of Sindh as per their qualifications in the light of aforesaid orders and the provisions of the Act, he would be satisfied and would not press this petition, which proposal has been accepted by the other side. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, the case of the petitioners strictly in terms of aforesaid Act and the ratio of the aforementioned judgment be considered by the Government of Sindh subject to all exceptions, in accordance with law.

Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, the case of the petitioners strictly in terms of aforesaid Act and the ratio of the aforementioned judgment be considered by the Government of Sindh subject to all exceptions, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
